title: Live updates + a sharper eye
items: The app now updates itself automatically — improvements arrive the moment they ship, no store update needed.
Fixed a rare false alarm where a real photo could be mislabeled AI from coincidental file bytes.
Your own real photos & videos now permanently train the detector to trust real media.
Reads X/Twitter AI-disclosure labels, alongside TikTok, YouTube and Instagram.
Detector accuracy up to 0.98 AUC with a 1.3% false-positive rate.
